category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line tool to lint GitLab CI YAML files; official GitLab project says it validates .gitlab-ci.yml using the GitLab API.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitLab project title both use gitlab-ci-linter.
docs_sources: Official GitLab project exposes README as the primary documentation; no separate official docs domain was identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://gitlab.com/orobardet/gitlab-ci-linter, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitLab project describe linting .gitlab-ci.yml via the GitLab API.
